targets.rawSql: SELECT mr.ts AS time, d->>'device_mac' AS device, d->>'grade' AS security_grade, (d->>'unprotected_characteristics')::int AS unprotected_chars, (d->>'total_characteristics')::int AS total_chars, d->>'sensitive_exposed' AS sensitive_exposed, mr.summary AS assessment FROM module_results mr, jsonb_array_elements(artifacts::jsonb->0->'data') AS d WHERE mr.module_name = 'ble.gatt_security_assessor' AND $__timeFilter(mr.ts) ORDER BY mr.ts DESC;

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT src) FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'ble' AND $__timeFilter(ts)) AS unique_macs, COALESCE((SELECT SUM((mr.metrics->>'estimated_devices')::int) FROM module_results mr WHERE mr.module_name = 'ble.mac_randomization_tracker' AND $__timeFilter(mr.ts)), 0) AS estimated_physical_devices;

SELECT d->>'device_mac' AS device, d->>'grade' AS grade, (d->>'unprotected_characteristics')::int AS unprotected_chars, (d->>'sensitive_exposed')::int AS sensitive_exposed, d->>'issues' AS issues FROM module_results mr, jsonb_array_elements(mr.artifacts::jsonb->0->'data') AS d WHERE mr.module_name = 'ble.gatt_security_assessor' AND mr.status = 'ok' AND (d->>'unprotected_characteristics')::int > 0 ORDER BY unprotected_chars DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT d->>'pairing_method' AS pairing_method, COUNT(*) AS device_count FROM module_results mr, jsonb_array_elements(mr.artifacts::jsonb->0->'data') AS d WHERE mr.module_name = 'ble.pairing_analyzer' AND mr.status = 'ok' AND d->>'pairing_method' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d->>'pairing_method' ORDER BY device_count DESC;
SELECT time_bucket('10 seconds', ts) AS time, src AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'ble' AND fields->>'pdu_type' = 'ADV_IND' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(fields->>'manufacturer_name', fields->>'manufacturer_data', 'Unknown') AS manufacturer, COUNT(DISTINCT src) AS device_count FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'ble' AND (fields->>'manufacturer_data' IS NOT NULL OR fields->>'manufacturer_name' IS NOT NULL) AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY COALESCE(fields->>'manufacturer_name', fields->>'manufacturer_data', 'Unknown') ORDER BY device_count DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT src AS device, AVG(rssi_dbm) AS avg_rssi, ROUND(POWER(10, ((-40 - AVG(rssi_dbm)) / 20.0))::numeric, 1) AS estimated_distance_m FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'ble' AND rssi_dbm IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY src ORDER BY avg_rssi DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT src AS device_mac, fields->>'manufacturer_data' AS manufacturer_data, fields->>'device_name' AS device_name, rssi_dbm AS rssi, COUNT(*) AS adv_count, MIN(ts) AS first_seen, MAX(ts) AS last_seen, CASE WHEN fields->>'manufacturer_data' LIKE '4c00%' THEN 'Apple (AirTag/FindMy)' WHEN fields->>'manufacturer_data' LIKE '0600%' THEN 'Microsoft' WHEN fields->>'manufacturer_data' LIKE 'fe00%' THEN 'Samsung SmartTag' WHEN fields->>'manufacturer_data' LIKE 'ed00%' THEN 'Tile' ELSE 'Other Tracker' END AS tracker_type FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'ble' AND fields->>'manufacturer_data' IS NOT NULL AND (fields->>'manufacturer_data' LIKE '4c00%' OR fields->>'manufacturer_data' LIKE '0600%' OR fields->>'manufacturer_data' LIKE 'fe00%' OR fields->>'manufacturer_data' LIKE 'ed00%') AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY src, fields->>'manufacturer_data', fields->>'device_name', rssi_dbm ORDER BY last_seen DESC;
